---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Open the popup / click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / console output

If applicable, add screenshots or the service-worker console log
(`chrome://extensions` → Privacy Auditor → "service worker" → Console).

## Environment

- Chrome version:
- Extension version (`manifest.json` → `version`):
- OS:

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — the site being audited, whether global protection was on, etc.
